scripts.setup: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const dirs = ['contracts', 'src/agent', 'src/dashboard', 'scripts']; dirs.forEach(dir => { if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true }); }); execSync('git init', { stdio: 'inherit' }); console.log('Setup complete: directories created and git initialized.');"
